title: elaeocarpus nitidus var. wrayi
intro: Elaeocarpus nitidus var. wrayi, also known as Wrayi's blue bean tree, is a plant species native to Malaysia, belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus nitidus var. wrayi include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
